title: It + be + no use/good + V-ing
explanation: 此句型用「It is no use/good + 動名詞」表達某動作缺乏效益或無法達成目的。結構上，it為虛主語，真正主語為後面的動名詞短語。使用時機為勸阻他人無謂的嘗試或陳述事實上無用功。易混淆點：應用動名詞而非不定詞；「no use」後接動名詞，不可接名詞；類似表達還有「There is no use in V-ing」或「It is useless to V」。注意「no good」可表達消極結果，「no use」強調無效用。

examples.eng: It is no use crying over spilled milk.
examples.chi: 覆水難收，為已發生的事哭泣是徒勞的。

examples.eng: It is no good trying to convince him because he is too stubborn.
examples.chi: 試圖說服他是沒有用的，因為他太固執了。

examples.eng: It is no use complaining about the weather without taking action.
examples.chi: 光是抱怨天氣而不採取行動是沒有用的。

examples.eng: It is no good waiting for him because he has already left the city.
examples.chi: 等他是沒有用的，因為他已經離開這個城市了。

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：「It is no use + V-ing」用於陳述事實上的無效，帶有規勸或勸阻意涵。常見錯誤：誤用「It is no use to V」或「It is no use + 名詞」。記住搭配必須是動名詞，表達「做某事於事無補」的客觀事實。

examples.test: It is no use to complain. ✗
examples.result: → It is no use complaining. ✓（應用動名詞，不用不定詞）

examples.test: It is no use crying over spilled milk. ✓
examples.result: → 正確用法，表示後悔過去的事是徒勞的

examples.test: There is no use in arguing with him. ✓
examples.result: → 替代表達方式，意思相同，都表達爭論無效

extension.note: 「It is no use + V-ing」=「It is useless to V」，動名詞為此句型的標準搭配，傳達「做……於事無補」之意。

exercises.sentence: It is no good trying to change the situation now.
exercises.translation: 現在試圖改變情況是沒有用的。

exercises.sentence: It is no use worrying about what cannot be changed.
exercises.translation: 為無法改變的事擔憂是徒勞的。

parts: that you did not know the truth.
exercises.sentence: It is no good pretending that you did not know the truth.
exercises.translation: 假裝你不知道真相是沒有用的。

parts: him because he has made up his mind.
exercises.sentence: It is no use arguing with him because he has made up his mind.
exercises.translation: 與他爭論是沒有用的，因為他已經下定決心了。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的句型補充，表示做某事沒有用處
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is no use _______ to change his mind because he is very determined.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B（trying）。此句型為「It is no use + 動名詞」，表達某動作缺乏效益。A 項用不定詞錯誤，違反句型結構；C 項缺少 to，不完整；D 項 to trying 混合了不定詞與動名詞，文法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境選擇正確的否定表達，表示某事無益
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is no good _______ you the truth if you refuse to listen to me.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（telling）。「It is no good + 動名詞」用來表達某動作無效果。B 項不定詞違反句型；C 項缺 to，非完整不定詞；D 項被動動名詞改變了意思邏輯。句子主語應為 telling 的執行者。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 補充合適動詞形式，表達無謂的嘗試
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is no use _______ about the past because we cannot change what has already happened.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C（worrying）。「It is no use + 動名詞」是固定句型，表示做某事沒有益處。A 項原形動詞不符文法；B 項不定詞違反句型結構；D 項被動語態改變邏輯且不合此句型。只有動名詞符合此表達方式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句義選擇正確形式，理解此句型與類似表達的差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is no good _______ him that he should quit smoking; there is no use _______ to make him understand.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（telling / trying）。兩個空格都應填入動名詞。第一空「It is no good + telling」；第二空「There is no use + V-ing」（「in trying」的簡化形式）。B、C、D 項都混入不定詞，違反「It is no use/good + 動名詞」的結構，且「There is no use in V-ing」也須用動名詞。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 跟他爭辯是沒用的，他已經決定了。
translation_exercises.answer: It is no use arguing with him; he has already made up his mind.
hints: 提示1：虛主語 It + be + no use + 動名詞，動名詞是真正主語
提示2：常見錯誤是用 to argue（不定詞）或 argue（原形動詞），記住一定要用動名詞形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 後悔沒有好處，我們應該向前看。
translation_exercises.answer: It is no good regretting what happened; we should look forward.
key_points: no good 強調消極結果或後悔無益
hints: 提示1：no good 和 no use 都適用此句型，但 no good 更強調情感或結果的負面性
提示2：注意 regretting 後面可接受詞 what happened，但不需要加介詞 about

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然他們不願意合作，試圖說服他們也是徒勞的。
translation_exercises.answer: Since they are unwilling to cooperate, it is no use trying to persuade them.
key_points: trying to persuade (動名詞短語搭配不定詞)
no use 強調行動無效用
hints: 提示1：動名詞可搭配不定詞，如 trying to persuade；整個短語 'trying to persuade them' 作為真正主語
提示2：易誤用 persuade 為動名詞 persuading，但此處 trying to persuade 是標準搭配，trying 是主要動名詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 一旦決定發佈，再想著刪除貼文就沒好處了，因為網路上的東西永遠不會完全消失。
translation_exercises.answer: Once you post it, it is no good thinking about deleting the post, because nothing on the internet ever disappears completely.
key_points: It is no good + V-ing (thinking about V-ing)
no good 表達無法改變既定事實的後悔或遺憾
hints: 提示1：動名詞可搭配介詞，如 thinking about V-ing；整句強調事後悔恨無益
提示2：區分 it is no good thinking about deleting（沒好處去想著刪除）與 there is no good in V-ing（兩種形式都正確，但本題用 It 開頭符合句型要求）
